is a command-line interpreter application available in most Windows operating systems. It allows you to execute commands by typing them, rather than using a graphical user interface (GUI) like clicking icons and menus.

When an unexpected event occurs, your main objective is not to resume normal operations as soon as possible, while maximizing the disruption to your business functions
